mapper.insert: INSERT INTO refund_request (payment_id, user_id, status, reason_code, reason_text, eligibility_result, credit_used, benefit_used, refund_amount, decision_basis_json) VALUES (#{paymentId}, #{userId}, #{status}, #{reasonCode}, #{reasonText}, #{eligibilityResult}, #{creditUsed}, #{benefitUsed}, #{refundAmount}, #{decisionBasisJson})
mapper.sql: rr.id, rr.payment_id, rr.user_id, rr.status, rr.reason_code, rr.reason_text, rr.eligibility_result, rr.credit_used, rr.benefit_used, rr.refund_amount, rr.decision_basis_json, rr.reviewed_by, rr.reviewed_reason, rr.requested_at, rr.reviewed_at, p.order_id, p.product_type, p.product_code, p.plan, p.amount AS payment_amount, p.paid_at, p.status AS payment_status, u.email AS user_email, u.name AS user_name
mapper.select: SELECT FROM refund_request rr JOIN payment p ON p.id = rr.payment_id JOIN users u ON u.id = rr.user_id WHERE rr.id = #{id}
SELECT FROM refund_request rr JOIN payment p ON p.id = rr.payment_id JOIN users u ON u.id = rr.user_id WHERE rr.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY rr.id DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE refund_request SET status = 'APPROVED', reviewed_by = #{adminId}, reviewed_reason = #{reviewedReason}, reviewed_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id} AND status = 'REQUESTED'
UPDATE refund_request SET status = 'REJECTED', reviewed_by = #{adminId}, reviewed_reason = #{reviewedReason}, reviewed_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id} AND status = 'REQUESTED'
UPDATE payment SET status = 'REFUNDED' WHERE id = #{paymentId} AND status = 'PAID'
